title: United Pilots Approve 40% Pay Hike In the Largest Contract In US Airline History

title: 3 Airline Stocks to Watch as Fuel Costs Rise

title: United Airlines backs revenue guidance as fuel prices rise
text: United Airlines Holdings Inc (NASDAQ:UAL) backed full-year revenue guidance as it raised its third-quarter fuel price outlook, citing a 20% jump in jet fuel prices since mid-July. The air carrier now expects fuel costs of $2.95 to $3.05 a gallon for the current quarter, up from previous guidance of $2.50 to $2.80 a gallon.

title: United Airlines boosts fuel price outlook, keeps revenue and capacity view intact
text: United Airlines Holdings Inc. UAL raised on Wednesday its third-quarter fuel price outlook, citing a 20% jump in jet fuel prices since mid-July. The air carrier now expects fuel costs of $2.95 to $3.05 a gallon for the current quarter, up from previous guidance of $2.50 to $2.80 a gallon.

title: United Airlines says the outage that held up departing flights was not a cybersecurity issue
text: United Airlines said Tuesday that a software update triggered a glitch that forced it to halt departures nationwide, briefly crippling one of the nation's biggest carriers on a busy travel day.
